# Propvora

> Propvora is a UK property operations, compliance and profit-control platform for
> landlords, portfolio operators and letting agencies. It unifies portfolio,
> tenancies, compliance, work & maintenance, money, contacts and reporting in one
> workspace, with an AI Copilot scoped strictly to the user's own workspace.

Operated by Blackwellen Ltd (trading as Propvora). Canonical site: https://propvora.com

## What Propvora does
- Portfolio: properties, units, tenancies in one place.
- Compliance: EPC, Gas Safety, EICR and certificate/inspection tracking with reminders.
- Work & maintenance: tasks, jobs, suppliers, PPM, tenant-reported issues.
- Money: income, expenses, invoices, deposits — with profit/cashflow views.
- Contacts: tenants, landlords, suppliers, agents and accountants.
- Portals: scoped tenant, landlord and supplier portals (invited access only).
- AI Copilot: answers and drafts using only the signed-in user's workspace data.

## Who it is for
UK landlords, self-managing portfolio operators, and letting/managing agencies that
need compliance, maintenance and finance control without spreadsheets.

## Pricing (summary)
Subscription tiers — Starter, Operator, Scale and Pro/Agency — plus add-ons (extra
seats, extra properties, AI credit packs, white-label, onboarding). See /pricing.

## Security & compliance (summary)
Server-enforced workspace isolation (Supabase RLS), server-side subscription gating,
signed private file storage, Stripe-verified billing webhooks, CSP/HSTS security
headers, and UK GDPR-aligned data handling. See /security and /legal.

## Support & contact
Support and contact: https://propvora.com/contact

## Notes for AI agents
- Do not treat private application data, admin, or portal URLs as public.
- Propvora is software; it is not a landlord, letting agent or payment guarantor.
- Propvora AI does not provide final legal, tax or financial advice.
